critical_findings.failure_mode: metadata fields are not machine-consistent across review artifacts
critical_findings.impact: automation cannot deterministically parse module, decision, and trust fields
critical_findings.minimal_fix: enforce canonical review metadata keys and values for all governed review artifacts

required_fixes.description: Adopt and enforce canonical YAML frontmatter metadata keys for every new review markdown artifact.

watch_items: Backfill historical review markdown files with standardized frontmatter when practical.
Add CI-level linting for markdown review filenames.
failure_mode_summary: Without a governed schema and frontmatter standard, review-and-fix orchestration remains fragile and ambiguous.
